name: Mulligan's Indoor Golf
about: Mulligan's Indoor Golf operates two locations in the Twin Cities metro area (Plymouth and Eagan, MN), offering indoor golf simulator bays for individual practice and group play. The facility uses a combination of Uneekor ball tracking technology and GSPro simulator software to provide a realistic golfing experience. Bay pricing is offered on an hourly basis, with a guarantee of the lowest rates in the Twin Cities. All transactions include a 2.5% processing fee for credit card payments, in addition to local sales tax. The venue is available for tee time booking and hosts leagues and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Guaranteed lowest hourly bay rates in the Twin Cities metro area
State-of-the-art simulators with Uneekor ball tracking and GSPro software
A large library of thousands of virtual golf courses to play and practice on

food_and_drink.notes: Offers 7th Avenue pizza, hot dogs, brats, and other snack items.
No mention of alcohol on the menu or website.

simulator_hardware.notes: System is described as featuring 'accurate ball tracking from Uneekor'.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention whether club rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers its own food and drinks, but does not specify if outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes generally take one player an hour to complete.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligan's Indoor Golf appears to be kid-friendly, offering games suitable for all skill levels and a casual, welcoming atmosphere.
